title: agrostis delislei
intro: Agrostis delislei, also known as Delisle's bent grass, is a species of grass within the genus Agrostis. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Agrostis delislei include its ability to soothe irritated airways and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for respiratory issues. Agrostis delislei can be prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing its leaves with a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
